rulings.Case Title: JOY ANDERSON VS. CITIAPARTMENTS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Joy Anderson'S Motion To Enforce Order Compelling Defendaants To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Equests For Production, And For An Award Of Monetary, Issue And Evidence Sanctions Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 12. Plaintiff Joy Anderson's Motion To Enforce Order Compelling Defendants To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Rquests For Production, And For An Award Of Monetary, Issue And Evidence Sanctions Against Defendants GRANTED as to issue and evidentiary sanctions in its entirety. Monetary sanctions are granted in the amount of $31,900, subject to moving party providing billing statements/invoices (redacted if necessary). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOY ANDERSON VS. CITIAPARTMENTS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Joy Anderson'S Motion For An Order Establishing Admissions, Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, And For An Award Of Sanctions Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 12. Plaintiff Joy Anderson's Motion For An Order Establishing Admissions, Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, And For An Award Of Sanctions Against Defendants GRANTED as to defendants who failed to serve responses. rulings.Case Title: NEIL HAYES et al VS. LISA PHAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defts From The Pltfs Operative Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTs LISA PHAM, AN PHAM, TRUC DAM abd ROSE DAM's Motion To Strike The Punitive Damages Allegation And Punitive Damages Claims As To Said Defendants From The Plaintiffs' Operative Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts re: malice and conscious disregard of probable dangerous consequences. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YANCY VS. XIANG KAI, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTs XIANG KAI, LLC, LAVANDER CASA, INC., CINDY ZHANG and RAYMOND ZHANG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to first cause of action for bad faith waste. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges fact showing that Xiang Kai used rental income for the benefit of itself and Zhangs instead of for the benefit of the property, resulting in al least some unpaid water bills become tax liens on the property. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for breach of contract to allege facts showing Xiang Kai¿s breach of lease (¶27), demurrer is overruled otherwise. Plaintiff¿s allegations that Zhangs were the alter ego of both Xiang Kai and Lavender Casa do not necessarily preclude separate corporate existence of Xiang Kai and Lavender Casa from each other for the purposes of contact formation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN VS. TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN's Motion To Vacate Dismissal DENIED. Plaintiff is seeking reconsideration, which is untimely. Plaintiff also fails to meet the burden under both CCP 473(b) and CCP 1008. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENT N. MIRKHANI et al VS. CROSSROADS TRADING CO. INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT CROSSROADS TRADING CO. INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENT N. MIRKHANI et al VS. CROSSROADS TRADING CO. INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT CROSSROADS TRADING CO. INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with Leave to amend for Plaintiff to specify the date for quiet title July 17, 2012, May 1, 2013 or some other date. rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF FARHAD ZAGHI's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver Continued to August 27, 2013 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS CAMPBELL VS. KIMBERLY HATHAWAY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF TRAVIS CAMPBELL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden. No competent evidence provided as to alleged nuisance and habitual late payment. Even if burden was shifted, Defendant raises triable issues of fact as to the nuisance and habitual late-payment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO WILSON VS. PHILLIP GARCIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Compel (1) Responses To Form Interrogatory Number 17.1, (2)Production Of Documents, (3), Inspection Of Def'S Flat, (4) Reimbursement Of Deposition Costs, (5) Provide Original Verifications, (6) Schedule Pltff'S Deposition, (7) Protective Order As To Shawn Markham, And (8) Monetary Sanctions Against Defense Counsel Benny Martin, Arlin Litman And/Or Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF ANGELO WILSON's Motion To Compel (1) Responses To Form Interrogatory Number 17.1, (2)Production Of Documents, (3), Inspection Of Defendant's Flat, (4) Reimbursement Of Deposition Costs, (5) Provide Original Verifications, (6) Schedule Plaintiff's Deposition, (7) Protective Order As To Shawn Markham, And (8) Monetary Sanctions Against Defense Counsel Benny Martin, Arlin Litman And/Or Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition, except for requests 1 and 2 (moot per reply). Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,443.50 ($1,250 attorney's fees; $193.50 court reporter). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO, YOEL, TRUSTEE FOR SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. YARNG ALTAWAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT YARNG ALTAWAL and SUSAN ALTAWAL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Defendants¿ Demurer to Complaint will be heard in Department 504 by Honorable Peter J Busch at 9:15 a.m. on August 6, 2013. Demurer on the grounds of (1) res judicata; (2) omission of necessary party from operative notice; (3) failure to provide an opportunity to cure; and (4) amendment of operative notice is OVERRULED. Demurrer on the grounds that amount of rent sought by ¶17c is not supported by ¿3 Day Notice to Pay rent or Quit¿ is SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAY LEAVE TO AMEND to reconcile allegations. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: RKI INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. EDWARD JELINEK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT SAMUEL ACKERMAN and BEAU HAWKINSON's Motion To Compel Answers Granted in part and denied in part. Defendant's motion to compel responses to Form Interrogatories-general is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant's Motion to Compel Responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production is DENIED. Meet and confer communications attached to counsel's declaration indicate that there were some responses/objections served. No copy of such responses provided. Separate statement indicates only "plaintiff refused to answer/provide documents." The Court is unable to determine if plaintiff provided any reason for such refusal. Sanctions granted in the amount of $300. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAMELSH PATEL VS. ALFANSO RAMIREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT ALFONSO RAMIREZ'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Granted subject to (1) Defendant presenting proof of service of the motion at the hearing; (2) opposition; and (3) filing answer no later than August 6, 2013 by 4 pm. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LON RICHARD DRIGGERS VS. ANTHONY TRBOVICH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013, line 11. PLAINTIFF LON DRIGGERS' Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories within 5 days of Notice of Entry of Order. Sanctions $550 in attorney¿s fees and $60 costs. = (501/REQ)
